title: phanera microstachya
intro: Phanera microstachya, also known as the Red-stemmed Phanera, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phanera microstachya include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
